target.name: Voya Energy
target.founder: Richard Wang, Matt Horton, Steven Kaye

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $13M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 9 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
Voya Energy is a seed-stage climate and energy company founded by Richard Wang, Matt Horton, and Steven Kaye that has raised $13M to date. The broader climate and energy sector comprises nine private peers—including Helion, Redwood Materials, QuantumScape, KoBold Metals, and Electric Hydrogen—alongside one public comparable (LNZA). However, the peer set lacks sufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage datapoints to support a median-based valuation, limiting applicability of traditional peer multiples.

The stage-progression method provides the primary valuation signal. Using the $13M total raised as a baseline value proxy and applying a 2.5x multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage progression, the analysis implies a valuation of $32M. This approach assumes Voya's capital efficiency and risk profile align with median seed-stage advancement patterns in the sector.

The triangulated valuation range is $28M (low) to $37M (high), with a median of $32M. This range reflects a ±15% confidence band around the stage-progression method. The primary uncertainty stems from insufficient comparable company data at Voya's stage within climate and energy; a wider peer set with validated same-stage transactions would narrow this range. Additionally, company-specific factors—technology maturity, revenue traction, capital efficiency—remain unquantified in this dataset and warrant deeper diligence.
